/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_linalg.so -o ../../../lib/libeckit_linalg.so CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/LinearAlgebra.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/LinearAlgebraDense.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/LinearAlgebraSparse.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/Matrix.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/SparseMatrix.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/Tensor.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/Triplet.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/Vector.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/allocator/BufferAllocator.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/allocator/NonOwningAllocator.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/allocator/StandardAllocator.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/allocator/StandardContainerAllocator.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/dense/LinearAlgebraGeneric.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_linalg.dir/sparse/LinearAlgebraGeneric.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
